summary: Iteration 202 Orbital Hub navigation system testing complete. All 15 features verified. Hub page loads with central pulsing orb, 12 orbiting satellites (6 inner, 6 outer), ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE overlay with all actions, resolution toggle, and ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE Portal link. Navbar hidden on /hub. OrbCorner appears on non-hub pages and navigates back to /hub. Backend regression tests pass (workshop/platonic-solids, mastery/tier).
critical_code_review_comments: OrbitalHub.js: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: 6 inner ring satellites (mood, mixer, map, breathing, meditation, theory) - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: 6 outer ring satellites (workshop, star-chart, trade, oracle, games, journal) - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: Central orb with data-testid='central-orb' opens ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: CosmicDust particles (40 floating particles) rendered - PASS
OrbitalHub.js: ConnectionLines SVG with hover effects - PASS
MissionControl.js: 6 actions (Profile, Dashboard, Settings, Mastery Tiers, Analytics, Admin) - PASS
MissionControl.js: Resolution toggle with data-testid='mc-resolution-toggle' - PASS
MissionControl.js: ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE Portal link with data-testid='mc-collective-link' - PASS
MissionControl.js: Close button with data-testid='mission-control-close' - PASS
OrbCorner.js: Fixed position bottom-left (z-45) with data-testid='orb-corner' - PASS
Navigation.js: /hub added to hidden paths (line 403) - PASS
App.js: /hub route with lazy import OrbitalHub - PASS
App.js: OrbCorner component rendered globally - PASS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 202 Orbital Hub navigation fully working. (1) /hub route loads OrbitalHub page with data-testid='orbital-hub-page'. (2) Central orb (data-testid='central-orb') is pulsing and clickable, opens ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE. (3) ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE panel (data-testid='mission-control-panel') shows: Profile, Dashboard, Settings, Mastery Tiers, Analytics, Admin actions with data-testid='mc-action-{name}'. Resolution toggle (data-testid='mc-resolution-toggle'). ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE Portal link (data-testid='mc-collective-link'). Close button (data-testid='mission-control-close'). (4) 6 inner ring satellites: satellite-mood, satellite-mixer, satellite-map, satellite-breathing, satellite-meditation, satellite-theory. (5) 6 outer ring satellites: satellite-workshop, satellite-star-chart, satellite-trade, satellite-oracle, satellite-games, satellite-journal. (6) Clicking satellites navigates to correct routes (e.g., satellite-mood → /mood, satellite-workshop → /workshop). (7) Navbar hidden on /hub page. (8) OrbCorner (data-testid='orb-corner') appears on non-hub pages at bottom-left (z-45), clicking navigates back to /hub. (9) OrbCorner hidden on /hub, /, /auth, /intro. (10) Backend regression: GET /api/workshop/platonic-solids and GET /api/mastery/tier still work with auth.

hub_page.title: 'The ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE' title displayed
hub_page.connection_lines: SVG dashed lines with hover effects

satellites.navigation: Clicking satellite navigates to correct route

mission_control.panel: data-testid='mission-control-panel' opens on central orb click

orb_corner.visibility: Hidden on /hub, /, /auth, /intro; visible on all other pages

navbar.hidden_on_hub: Navigation.js returns null when pathname is /hub
